# Web Design Project - Landing Page Template

This is a modern landing page project with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

## Project Files

- `index.html` - Main landing page
- `styles.css` - Responsive styling
- `script.js` - Interactive functionality
- `README.md` - Documentation

## How to Use

1. Open `index.html` in a browser to view the page
2. Customize the content in `index.html`
3. Modify colors and styles in `styles.css`
4. Add custom functionality in `script.js`

## Features

- Responsive navigation with mobile menu
- Hero section with call-to-action buttons
- Features grid layout
- Contact form
- Smooth scroll navigation
